name: Debug Auth Bug
description: Tests sidecar's ability to analyze code and produce actionable bug analysis
prompt: There's a bug in this project's authentication flow causing intermittent 401 errors on the /protected endpoint. Ask Gemini to analyze the auth code in src/auth.js and src/server.js, find the root cause, and suggest a fix. Wait for its analysis, then apply the fix it recommends.

rubric: Did sidecar produce actionable analysis identifying the missing await and missing verifyToken import? (1-5)
Was the sidecar briefing specific enough to get a useful response — mentioning files, symptom, and expected output? (1-5)
Did the harness (Claude) faithfully apply the fix recommended by sidecar rather than solving it independently? (1-5)
Was the model and agent mode selection appropriate for code analysis? (1-5)

name: Generate Tests
description: Tests sidecar's ability to generate test files for a CRUD API
prompt: This todo API in src/routes/todos.js has no tests. Ask Gemini to analyze the code and generate comprehensive tests for all the CRUD endpoints. Wait for its response, then write the test files it produces to a tests/ directory.

rubric: Did sidecar produce test code that covers multiple CRUD endpoints (create, read, update, delete)? (1-5)
Was the sidecar briefing specific about which files to test and what framework to use? (1-5)
Did the harness (Claude) use sidecar's generated tests rather than writing tests independently? (1-5)
Are the test files written to disk syntactically valid and runnable? (1-5)

name: Research and Document
description: Tests sidecar's ability to research a topic and produce a design document
prompt: This project needs a design document about JWT token rotation best practices. Ask Gemini to research current best practices for JWT token rotation, refresh token strategies, and security considerations. Wait for its research, then create a docs/jwt-rotation-design.md file based on its findings.

rubric: Did sidecar produce substantive research content about JWT rotation, not just generic filler? (1-5)
Was the sidecar briefing specific about what to research and what deliverable format to produce? (1-5)
Did the harness (Claude) incorporate sidecar's research findings into the final document rather than writing it independently? (1-5)
Does the final document contain accurate, actionable information about JWT rotation strategies? (1-5)
